name: @cognistore/mcp-server
description: MCP server for CogniStore — integrates with Claude Code and GitHub Copilot

scripts.build:deps: pnpm --filter @cognistore/shared build && pnpm --filter @cognistore/core build && pnpm --filter @cognistore/embeddings build && pnpm --filter @cognistore/sdk build
scripts.test: if find . -name '*.test.ts' -o -name '*.spec.ts' | grep -q .; then npx playwright test; else echo 'No tests found, skipping'; fi
